data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for outcome linkage to certification/completion status.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Outcome linkage to certification/completion status', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this linkage. The linked use case mentions the need for outcome linkage, yet does not provide any concrete evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its implementation or availability. This leads to an inconclusive result regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of outcome linkage to certification/completion status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for outcome linkage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of outcome linkage to certification/completion status.
